ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Amy Harrington, Esq., for Evan Deerfield, Petitioner.
Debi Cournale, Rosella Riccetti, and Cristiano Rigo, Interested Parties.

The court and Ms. Harrington discuss her efforts locating heirs at law. Ms. Harrington points to the genealogy chart that she included with the declaration filed on Sep-29-2023. Ms. Harrington offers clarification regarding the decedent's parents' trust and real property located in Italy. After additional discussion, the court advises of its intent to admit the will and of additional orders of the court. No objections are presented. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-14-2008 is admitted to probate. Evan Deerfield is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simon is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-03-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nguyen. Not Reported.
